caption: A man is centered within a circular frame set against a solid black background. He is wearing a dark, patterned shirt with light-colored trim and a matching dark cap. He looks toward the camera with a slight smile. The man remains stationary and maintains his expression and posture throughout the sequence, as the imagery is identical across the frames. The text "Seyi Adebola" appears in a small, white font on the left and center sides of the black background, remaining in a fixed position. No other people, objects, or equipment are visible in the scene.
